trigger_event: My wealthy friend bought a Mercedes, and his boss found out about it.

characters.name: Wealthy Friend (Zhang San)
characters.identity: Top sales performer in the company, high-profile personality, likes to show off, but actually bears significant mortgage pressure.

relationships.Boss (Li Si): Subordinate. Previously had friction over stealing clients.

characters.name: Boss (Li Si)
characters.identity: A control freak, suspicious nature, strongly dislikes subordinates overshadowing him, particularly sensitive to rumors about unfair compensation in the company.

relationships.Wealthy Friend (Zhang San): Views him as a cash cow, but is wary of his growing influence.
